hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Warsh 言论推动比特币突破 60,000 美元后，以太坊、solana 和狗狗币纷纷上涨；【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【FINANCE】克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的。

items.title: Ether, solana, dogecoin in the green after Warsh comments push bitcoin above $60,000
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed back above $60,000 for the first time in over a week after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh said inflation risks had come down. Solana led the majors, up about 16% on the week, while a semiconductor selloff hit Asian markets and dented the AI trade that has pulled capital fr
items.title_zh: Warsh 言论推动比特币突破 60,000 美元后，以太坊、solana 和狗狗币纷纷上涨
items.summary_zh: 在美联储主席凯文·沃什表示通胀风险已经下降后，比特币一周多以来首次回升至 60,000 美元以上。 Solana 领涨各大板块，本周上涨约 16%，而半导体抛售袭击了亚洲市场，削弱了人工智能交易，而人工智能交易已将资本从

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.summary: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.
items.title_zh: 克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的
items.summary_zh: 贝丝·哈马克 (Beth Hammack) 告诉 CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen)：“我们的通货膨胀率太高了，过去五年一直太高。”

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Catholic Group Consecrates 4 Bishops, Risking Break With Vatican
items.summary: The traditionalist Society of St. Pius X went ahead with the ceremony, even after the Vatican warned it would result in the bishops’ excommunication.
items.title_zh: 天主教团体冒着与梵蒂冈决裂的风险祝圣四位主教
items.summary_zh: 传统主义的圣庇护十世协会仍继续举行仪式，尽管梵蒂冈警告这将导致主教被逐出教会。

items.title: Jefferies warns against buying the dip in Circle as Open USD raises new competition fears
items.summary: The investment bank said new competition from the Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium could pressure USDC's growth.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞 (Jefferies) 警告不要逢低买入 Circle，因为 Open USD 引发了新的竞争担忧
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，来自 Stripe 和 Coinbase 支持的稳定币财团的新竞争可能会给 USDC 的增长带来压力。

items.title: Cantor says bitcoin bear market may be entering final stretch
items.summary: The bank said in a note bitcoin's cycle points to a market bottom in the coming months, urging investors to focus on networks with durable value accrual.
items.title_zh: 坎托表示比特币熊市可能正在进入最后阶段
items.summary_zh: 该银行在一份报告中表示，比特币的周期表明未来几个月市场将触底，敦促投资者关注具有持久价值累积的网络。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.title_zh: 习近平在庆祝建党105周年讲话中宣扬中国共产党的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
items.title_zh: 随着与美国的人工智能竞争加剧，与中国相关的参与者的目标不仅仅是技术
items.summary_zh: 分析师警告称，随着美国人工智能竞赛的加剧，来自中国实体的网络攻击正在增加，而且不仅仅针对特定技术。

items.title: 'Two weeks after her death I got a call': Gaza patients face agonising delays for evacuation
items.summary: An estimated 300 Palestinians referred for treatment abroad have died since the ceasefire began, according to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry.
items.title_zh: “她去世两周后我接到电话”：加沙患者面临疏散延误的痛苦
items.summary_zh: 据加沙哈马斯卫生部称，自停火开始以来，估计有 300 名被转介到国外接受治疗的巴勒斯坦人死亡。

items.title: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'
items.summary: Kleiber Moran, 2, was rescued on Wednesday, six days after last week's deadly earthquakes.
items.title_zh: 从废墟中救出的委内瑞拉男孩的姨妈告诉BBC，她会给他“母亲的温暖”
items.summary_zh: 周三，也就是上周发生致命地震六天后，两岁的克莱伯·莫兰 (Kleiber Moran) 获救。

items.title: Did this AI anti-drug video make drugs look appealing?
items.summary: Hong Kong’s Correctional Services Department removed an AI-generated K-pop video, after facing backlash that it made substances look too appealing.
items.title_zh: 这段AI禁毒视频让毒品看起来有魅力吗？
items.summary_zh: 香港惩教署删除了一段由人工智能生成的韩国流行音乐视频，此前该视频遭到强烈反对，认为该视频使物质看起来太有吸引力。

items.title: The US deported them to Venezuela - hours later earthquakes struck
items.summary: They landed on Flight 164 just before the twin quakes. Family members are desperately searching for them.
items.title_zh: 美国将他们驱逐到委内瑞拉 - 数小时后发生地震
items.summary_zh: 他们在两次地震之前降落在 164 航班上。家人正在拼命寻找他们。

items.title: Nigeria to seek compensation for property abandoned by citizens fleeing South Africa
items.summary: Nigeria's High Commissioner says businesses and properties left behind by returnees are being documented.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚将为逃离南非的公民遗弃的财产寻求赔偿
items.summary_zh: 尼日利亚高级专员表示，返回者留下的企业和财产正在被记录下来。

items.title: Celebrating the World Cup, the English Ask: Who Owns the Flag?
items.summary: The national flag of England, a white banner with a bold red cross, has been displayed by soccer fans during the World Cup. But it has caused tension over whom, and what, it is meant to represent.
items.title_zh: 庆祝世界杯，英国人问：谁拥有国旗？
items.summary_zh: 英格兰国旗是一面带有粗体红十字的白色旗帜，在世界杯期间被球迷展示。但这引起了关于它代表谁、代表什么的紧张。

items.title: Trump Suggestion of a Syrian Crackdown on Hezbollah Confounds Many in Mideast
items.summary: During peace talks, President Trump repeatedly floated the idea that Syria could help subdue Hezbollah in Lebanon. The proposal revived bitter memories.
items.title_zh: 特朗普关于叙利亚镇压真主党的建议令中东许多人感到困惑
items.summary_zh: 在和谈中，特朗普总统多次提出叙利亚可以帮助镇压黎巴嫩真主党的想法。这个提议勾起了痛苦的回忆。

items.title: Ethereum Institutional launch draws support from across the Ethereum ecosystem
items.summary: Its launch comes as Ethereum's support ecosystem undergoes a broader evolution, following the debut of EthLabs and amid ongoing efforts by the Ethereum Foundation to respond to community criticism over transparency, communication and its role within the ecosystem.
items.title_zh: 以太坊机构的推出得到了整个以太坊生态系统的支持
items.summary_zh: 它的推出正值以太坊的支持生态系统经历更广泛的演变之际，继 EthLabs 首次亮相之后，以及以太坊基金会不断努力回应社区对透明度、沟通及其在生态系统中的作用的批评。

items.title: Kalshi and Polymarket’s combined volume surges 75% to $45 billion in June amid World Cup fever
items.summary: Among the three, Kalshi saw the largest month-over-month increase in volume, growing 87.4% to $31.5 billion from $16.81 billion.
items.title_zh: 受世界杯热潮影响，6 月份 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的总交易额飙升 75%，达到 450 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 在这三者中，Kalshi 的成交量环比增幅最大，从 168.1 亿美元增长 87.4% 至 315 亿美元。

items.title: ‘We desperately need legislation that includes an agreement on ethics:’ Trump financial filing adds urgency to crypto bill negotiations
items.summary: Trump's financial disclosure, revealing millions in crypto-related income, is adding urgency to write ethics restrictions into a crypto bill.
items.title_zh: “我们迫切需要包括道德协议在内的立法：”特朗普的财务文件增加了加密货币法案谈判的紧迫性
items.summary_zh: 特朗普的财务披露披露了数百万美元与加密货币相关的收入，这增加了将道德限制写入加密法案的紧迫性。

items.title: Forward Industries jumps 17% after expanding Solana treasury to 7.55 million SOL
items.summary: Forward Industries holds more SOL than the next three largest publicly traded Solana treasury companies combined.
items.title_zh: 将 Solana 金库扩大至 755 万 SOL 后，Forward Industries 股价上涨 17%
items.summary_zh: Forward Industries 持有的 SOL 数量超过了紧随其后的三大上市 Solana 财务公司的总和。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: At least 13 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.summary: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯大规模导弹和无人机袭击基辅 至少13人死亡
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰官员表示，俄罗斯对该市发动了几周来最大规模的袭击，伤亡人数“相当多”是儿童。

items.title: Bitcoin's long-term holders have returned to accumulation
items.summary: Long-term holding wallets have shifted to net accumulation from net distribution, according to Glassnode.
items.title_zh: 比特币的长期持有者已恢复积累
items.summary_zh: Glassnode 表示，长期持有钱包已从净分配转向净积累。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation lays out use cases for governments, institutions in new policy guide
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation said policymakers should distinguish between decentralized public blockchains and networks that remain controlled by corporations or foundations, arguing that governance structures will play a critical role in determining which platforms are suitable for l
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会在新政策指南中为政府和机构列出了用例
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会表示，政策制定者应该区分去中心化的公共区块链和仍然由公司或基金会控制的网络，并认为治理结构将在确定哪些平台适合区块链方面发挥关键作用。

items.title: Ark Invest scoops up $18 million in Circle shares as stock dips 41% over past month
items.summary: Circle dropped 1% today after falling nearly 18% on Tuesday following the launch of the rival stablecoin project OUSD.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 买入价值 1800 万美元的 Circle 股票，股价过去一个月下跌 41%
items.summary_zh: 在竞争对手稳定币项目 OUSD 推出后，Circle 在周二下跌近 18% 后，今天下跌了 1%。

items.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets 1-for-15 reverse stock split in bid to maintain Nasdaq listing
items.summary: American Bitcoin's reverse split will reduce outstanding shares from roughly 1.09 billion to about 73 million.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的美国比特币设定15股反向股票分割，以维持纳斯达克上市
items.summary_zh: 美国比特币的反向分割将使流通股从约10.9亿股减少至约7300万股。

items.title: ‘An honest, neutral counterpart:’ Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back new Ethereum Institutional non-profit
items.summary: Bitmine, Sharplink and Consensys CEO Joseph Lubin are backing another Ethereum-focused non-profit called the Ethereum Institutional.
items.title_zh: “诚实、中立的对手：”Bitmine、Sharplink 和 Joe Lubin 支持新的以太坊非营利机构
items.summary_zh: Bitmine、Sharplink 和 Consensys 首席执行官 Joseph Lubin 正在支持另一个专注于以太坊的非营利组织，称为以太坊机构。

items.title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
items.summary: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.
items.title_zh: Phantom 钱包上基于 Solana 的预测市场应用程序推出
items.summary_zh: “预测市场是可以在高性能区块链上构建的最强大的应用程序之一，”Solana 基金会表示。

items.title: ‘We are bullish on Morpho’: Standard Chartered sees token at $60 by 2030, outperforming bitcoin and ether
items.summary: Standard Chartered forecasts Morpho at $60 by 2030, citing vault growth, TradFi adoption and a projected 37x DeFi expansion.
items.title_zh: “我们看好 Morpho”：渣打银行预计 2030 年代币价格将达到 60 美元，表现优于比特币和以太币
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行预测，到 2030 年，Morpho 的价格将达到 60 美元，理由是金库增长、TradFi 的采用以及预计 37 倍的 DeFi 扩张。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在 2026 年人工智能驱动的反弹中，卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 几乎翻了一番后，他首次做空卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar)
items.summary_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 “我从未做空卡特彼勒。过去，它在做多方面一直对我有很大帮助。”

items.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
items.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.
items.title_zh: 小盘股上半年表现 35 年来最好。这就是推动它的因素
items.summary_zh: 此次上涨标志着多年来与大盘股相比表现不佳之后的急剧转变。

items.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
items.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，美国出口反弹，中国经济六月回升
items.summary_zh: 中国经济在经历了几个月的低迷之后，正显示出复苏的迹象，部分原因是对美国的出口量出现反弹。

items.title: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum
items.summary: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.
items.title_zh: BBC发现在法国被定罪的人口走私者居住在英国并寻求庇护
items.summary_zh: 他曾被称为法国移民营的“教父”，一直在莱斯特郡的一个村庄工作。

items.title: From Truman's pension to Trump's billions - a White House windfall unmatched by any president
items.summary: Historians say Trump's $2.2bn income last year is unprecedented and blurs the line on conflicts of interest.
items.title_zh: 从杜鲁门的养老金到特朗普的数十亿美元——白宫的意外之财是任何总统都无法比拟的
items.summary_zh: 历史学家表示，特朗普去年 22 亿美元的收入是史无前例的，模糊了利益冲突的界限。

items.title: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
items.summary: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.
items.title_zh: 阿富汗人说，在我们因冻伤失去四肢之前，土耳其警察用铁棍殴打我们
items.summary_zh: 前往欧洲的年轻移民表示，他们在严寒中被剥光衣服，双手被绑住。

items.title: US blocks long-term renewal of North American trade deal
items.summary: US blocks 16-year North America trade deal renewal, triggering annual rolling reviews
items.title_zh: 美国阻止北美贸易协议长期续签
items.summary_zh: 美国阻止续签16年北美贸易协定，引发年度滚动审查

items.title: Underground Births, Under Bombardment: Childbearing in Ukraine
items.summary: Bombings, blackouts and displacement compound maternal anxiety. Still, many women persevere. “We must bring new life,” one said.
items.title_zh: 轰炸下的地下分娩：乌克兰的生育
items.summary_zh: 爆炸、停电和流离失所加剧了产妇的焦虑。尽管如此，许多女性还是坚持了下来。 “我们必须带来新的生命，”其中一位说。

items.title: As Earthquake Death Toll Mounts, Venezuela Grapples With Recovering and Burying Bodies
items.summary: As the death toll mounts, thousands of bodies have overwhelmed Venezuela’s forensic system, turning a seaport into a temporary morgue.
items.title_zh: 随着地震死亡人数不断增加，委内瑞拉努力寻找和掩埋尸体
items.summary_zh: 随着死亡人数不断增加，数千具尸体已经不堪重负，委内瑞拉的法医系统不堪重负，将一个海港变成了临时停尸房。

items.title: U.S. and Iran Set to Hold Indirect Talks After Trading Attacks: What to Know
items.summary: Negotiators are in Qatar for indirect talks and ship traffic has risen in the Strait of Hormuz, even as Tehran and Washington remain far apart on key issues. Here’s what to know.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗将在贸易袭击后举行间接会谈：需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 尽管德黑兰和华盛顿在关键问题上仍存在很大分歧，但谈判代表正在卡塔尔进行间接谈判，霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量有所增加。以下是需要了解的内容。

items.title: Bombings in Greece Target Governing Party Members, Officials Say
items.summary: A candidate for Parliament for the New Democracy party was injured in one of the bombings in the city of Thessaloniki, as were her parents, the police said.
items.title_zh: 官员称希腊爆炸袭击目标是执政党成员
items.summary_zh: 警方称，一名新民主党议会候选人在塞萨洛尼基市的一次爆炸事件中受伤，她的父母也受伤。

items.title: After Venezuela Earthquakes, Deportees from the U.S. Are Missing or Found Dead
items.summary: Many of the 146 Venezuelans deported from the United States the day the earthquake struck are feared dead.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震后，美国被驱逐者失踪或被发现死亡
items.summary_zh: 地震发生当天，146 名委内瑞拉人被美国驱逐出境，其中许多人恐已死亡。

items.title: A Risky Burial in the Heart of an Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Safe interment is critical to containing the deadly disease, but in recent days around one Congolese town, that was not always being done.
items.title_zh: 埃博拉疫情中心的危险埋葬
items.summary_zh: 安全安葬对于遏制这种致命疾病至关重要，但最近几天，在刚果的一个城镇周围，情况并非总是如此。

items.title: A Town in Quebec Is the First Governing Body to Adopt the Universal Declaration of the Rights of Trees
items.summary: Terrasse-Vaudreuil has adopted a resolution to protect trees, which its mayor called “indispensable allies,” as living beings.
items.title_zh: 魁北克省的一个小镇是第一个通过《世界树木权利宣言》的管理机构
items.summary_zh: Terrasse-Vaudreuil 通过了一项保护树木的决议，市长称之为“不可或缺的盟友”。

items.title: XRP edges higher as whale activity rises while retail traders stay cautious
items.summary: New wallet creation hit a three-month high and large-holder activity strengthened, but XRP still needs to reclaim $1.10 before the recovery looks convincing.
items.title_zh: 随着鲸鱼活动增加而零售交易者保持谨慎，XRP 小幅走高
items.summary_zh: 新钱包创建量创下三个月新高，大户活动增强，但 XRP 仍需要收回 1.10 美元，复苏看起来才令人信服。

items.title: FBI Director Kash Patel caught sleeping on required disclosure of six-figure MSTR investment: Report
items.summary: Patel loaded up on BTC-holder MSTR shares but failed to file a timely disclosure, according to a report by nonpartisan news outlet NOTUS.
items.title_zh: 联邦调查局 (FBI) 局长卡什·帕特尔 (Kash Patel) 因要求披露六位数的 MSTR 投资而睡着了：报告
items.summary_zh: 据无党派新闻媒体 NOTUS 报道，帕特尔大量买入 BTC 持有者 MSTR 股票，但未能及时披露信息。

items.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain as it expands deeper into crypto
items.summary: Robinhood's product push continues to blur the line between crypto and more traditional finance.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 推出公共区块链，深入加密货币领域
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 的产品推广继续模糊了加密货币和更传统金融之间的界限。

items.title: Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400 million crypto Ponzi case
items.summary: Christopher Delgado allegedly used investor funds for a lavish lifestyle, including luxury properties and vehicles, while running a fraudulent scheme from 2023 to 2026.
items.title_zh: Goliath Ventures 首席执行官在价值 4 亿美元的加密货币庞氏骗局中认罪
items.summary_zh: 克里斯托弗·德尔加多 (Christopher Delgado) 涉嫌利用投资者资金过奢侈的生活方式，包括豪华房产和车辆，同时在 2023 年至 2026 年期间实施欺诈计划。

items.title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
items.summary: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.
items.title_zh: Robinhood Chain 与 24/7 代币化股票、Lighter perps 和计划中的加密代理交易一起在主网上上线
items.summary_zh: Robinhood Chain 是使用 Arbitrum 技术堆栈构建的第 2 层，从第一天起就在公共主网上上线，合作伙伴包括 Uniswap。

items.title: Venice AI raises $65 million Series A at $1 billion equity valuation led by Dragonfly
items.summary: Erik Voorhees' crypto-AI startup Venice has raised $65 million in a Series A funding round at a $1 billion equity valuation, led by Dragonfly.
items.title_zh: Venice AI 以 10 亿美元股权估值筹集 6500 万美元 A 轮融资，由 Dragonfly 领投
items.summary_zh: Erik Voorhees 的加密人工智能初创公司 Venice 在由 Dragonfly 领投的 A 轮融资中筹集了 6500 万美元，股权估值为 10 亿美元。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨源存储 API

items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.

items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
